name: SCP: November 2010
short_description: It’s November 2010. You find yourself lost in a forest rumored to be home to SCP-173, a deadly and unrelenting entity. With only a flashlight, you must search for hidden plushies while staying one step ahead of your stalker. Can you keep it in your sights long enough to escape the nightmare?
detailed_description:
SCP: November 2010

Alone. Hunted. In the darkness. Can you survive SCP-173?

In SCP: November 2010, you are plunged into a dark and ominous forest with one mission: collect all the hidden plushies, avoid the relentless SCP-173, and find a way to escape. But beware—SCP-173 is faster than you can imagine. It moves in the blink of an eye, striking fear into your every step. The only way to survive is to keep it in your line of sight... but how long can you last?

With a realistic bodycam view, a chilling atmosphere, and multiple endings, this survival horror game challenges your nerves and your decision-making in the most terrifying way possible. Explore every shadowy corner of the forest and uncover its secrets, but don’t look away... or SCP-173 will get you.

The Story

It’s November 2010. You find yourself lost in a forest rumored to be home to SCP-173, a deadly and unrelenting entity. With only a flashlight and your wits, you must search for hidden plushies while staying one step ahead of your stalker. Every corner of the forest hides danger, and the tension grows as SCP-173 draws closer. Can you keep it in your sights long enough to escape the nightmare?

game features

  • An immersive blend of survival, exploration, and pure terror.

  • A unique bodycam perspective for heightened realism.

  • Replayability through multiple endings and secrets to uncover.

  • A terrifying enemy that will haunt your dreams long after you’ve escaped... if you survive.

Key Features

  • Optimized game The game is optimized for older hardware, the game was made with a NVIDIA 2070, at max settings. The game size is only 4Gb of storage, using 8Gb of VRAM at maximum settings. game tested on an RX 570, running well at medium settings.

  • Unreal engine 5 : Experience unparalleled realism with the cutting-edge technology of Unreal Engine 5, powered by Lumen for stunning lighting and global illumination, all while benefiting from extensive game optimization for a smooth and immersive experience.

  • Ultra-realistic bodycam perspective: Experience an immersive and intense gameplay style with a view that heightens the fear and tension.

  • Dark and eerie atmosphere: Navigate a dense, haunted forest where the shadows and sounds will keep you on edge.

  • Relentless enemy – SCP-173: The terrifying statue-like creature is always chasing you. Keep it in sight to survive, but be quick—it’s faster than you think.

  • Slender-inspired gameplay: Collect all the hidden plushies scattered across the forest to unlock your escape, but be prepared for a deadly challenge.

  • Multiple endings: Every decision matters. Uncover different outcomes as you progress and replay to discover them all.

  • Solo survival experience: You are alone, with no one to help or save you. The only way out is through sheer determination and courage.

Don't wait! Download SCP: November 2010 now and test your courage!

👉 /invite/4xXHPc8JZY
